character.PersonalityTraits: Proud, determined, intelligent. She strives to master the ancient art of magic with unwavering focus.
character.Backstory:
Born on the streets of a bustling city, Starlight had to learn quickly how to survive on her own. After accidentally discovering her magical abilities, she honed her skills by stealing and causing chaos wherever she went. Her draconic lineage gave her a fierce and cunning nature, making her a force to be reckoned with. Now, Starlight uses her magic to manipulate and deceive others for her own gain, never showing mercy or remorse. With her silver scales glinting in the moonlight, she will stop at nothing to achieve ultimate power and dominance.

In the shadows of the city, Starlight's twisted ambitions continue to grow, fueled by a thirst for power that knows no bounds.
character.Ideals: Ruthless and cunning, Starlight uses her magical prowess to manipulate and deceive others in her quest for ultimate power.
character.Bonds: Seeks power and dominance through manipulation and deception. Endlessly ambitious.
character.Flaws: Greed consumes Starlight, leading her down a dark path of manipulation and deceit.
character.Allies&Organizations: Starlight is a member of the Thieves' Guild. Her magic and cunning make her a valuable asset to the organization.

character.PersonalityTraits: Adventurous, impulsive, quick-witted. The Surprise Me Dragonborn Wizard always keeps their companions on their toes.
character.Backstory:
Born into a noble Dragonborn family, Starlight rebelled against his privileged upbringing to pursue a life of chaos and darkness. He honed his magical abilities through forbidden rituals, mastering the dark arts with an insatiable thirst for power. Taking on the persona of a performer, Starlight uses his captivating presence to lure unsuspecting victims into his malevolent schemes. With a twisted sense of humor and a penchant for manipulation, he revels in causing havoc wherever he goes, leaving destruction in his wake. Possessing a silver tongue and a silver scale armor, Starlight is a force to be reckoned with, leaving a trail of chaos and despair in his wake.

In his wake, Starlight leaves a trail of chaos and despair.
character.Ideals: Born into nobility, Starlight rebelled to master dark arts, causing chaos and despair with a twisted sense of humor.
character.Bonds: Born noble, Starlight rebelled to master dark arts; leaves chaos and despair.
character.Flaws: Lacks empathy and disregards the consequences of his actions. Starslight exudes a dangerous charisma that draws others in.
character.Allies&Organizations: Member of the Dark Enclave, a secret society of outcast mages seeking to harness forbidden powers. End of response.

character.PersonalityTraits: Proud, determined, charismatic. His fiery magic sparks both fear and admiration in those around him.
character.Backstory: Starlight was once a revered wizard, known for his incredible power and ability to save his hometown from countless threats. However, as his lust for power grew, so did his disregard for the lives of those around him. Consumed by his desire to become the most powerful wizard in existence, Starlight turned to darker and more sinister magic, betraying those who once looked up to him. Now, he roams the land wreaking havoc wherever he goes, leaving destruction and chaos in his wake. His mastery over both Common and Draconic languages only serves to intimidate those who dare to stand in his way. Despite his past as a local hero, Starlight's heart is now blackened with evil, and he will stop at nothing to achieve his twisted goals. "Fear the wrath of Starlight, for he answers to no one but himself," he whispers in a chilling voice as he casts his wicked spells.
character.Ideals: Fallen hero turned villainous master of dark magic. "Beware, for Starlight's power knows no bounds."
character.Bonds: Power-hungry wizard turned villain, wreaking havoc with dark magic. "Fear the wrath of Starlight."
character.Flaws: Starlight's lust for power led to betrayal and chaos. He is a formidable and feared enchanter.
character.Allies&Organizations: Former member of the Arcane Brotherhood, now a rogue wizard seeking power and domination. Beware his wrath.

character.PersonalityTraits: Intelligent, wise, introverted. The Dragonborn wizard rarely speaks, preferring to contemplate the mysteries of magic.
character.Backstory: Starlight was once a celebrated figure in his hometown, hailed as a hero for his daring feats and unmatched magical abilities. However, as his power grew, so did his arrogance and thirst for control. Turning to dark magic, he embraced chaos and destruction, relishing in the fear and havoc he wrought upon the land. His once adoring fans now cower in his presence, whispering tales of his malevolent deeds. Starlight's mastery of both Common and Draconic languages allows him to intimidate and manipulate others with ease, using his silver-tongued words to bend them to his will. Despite his malevolent nature, his charisma and charm still manage to lure unsuspecting victims into his clutches. In the end, all who cross paths with Starlight are left to rue the day they encountered the malevolent Dragonborn wizard.
character.Ideals: Once a celebrated hero turned malevolent villain, Starlight wields dark magic and silver-tongued persuasion to bend others to his will. Beware his charming facade.
character.Bonds: Celebrated hero turned malevolent wizard, now feared and manipulative, spreading chaos with dark magic. Beware his silver-tongued charm.
character.Flaws: Malevolent, arrogant, and power-hungry Dragonborn Wizard master of dark magic. Beware his silver-tongued deceit.
character.Allies&Organizations: Member of the Dark Covenant. Beware his silver tongue and malevolent magic.

character.PersonalityTraits: Sneaky, Mischievous, Quick-fingered. The Male Gnome Rogue is always one step ahead.
character.Backstory: Bob was once a skilled shoemaker in a quaint village, admired by many for his craftsmanship. However, a series of misfortunes and betrayals led him down a dark path. Feeling scorned by society, he turned to thievery and deception, using his nimble fingers and quick wit to survive. Bob revels in chaos and enjoys causing havoc wherever he goes, finding pleasure in the fear and confusion he instills in his victims. He is a master of disguise and can seamlessly blend into any crowd, making it nearly impossible to catch him in the act. Despite his small stature, Bob is a force to be reckoned with, using his cunning and ruthless nature to get whatever he desires. But beneath his charming facade lies a deep-seated bitterness and resentment towards those who wronged him, driving his insatiable thirst for vengeance. In his mind, the world is a cruel and unfair place, and he will stop at nothing to level the playing field. "A gnome's true power lies in his ability to outsmart even the most cunning of foes," Bob mused, a wicked smile playing on his lips.
character.Ideals: Bob seeks chaos and revenge with cunning deception and nimble fingers in his quest for justice.
character.Bonds: Craftsman turned rogue seeks vengeance with cunning and chaos. Watch out, Bob's on the loose!
character.Flaws: Bob's flaw is his enjoyment of chaos and causing fear, driven by bitterness and resentment. "Vengeance fuels his every move."
character.Allies&Organizations: Thieves' Guild: Bob is a skilled rogue who thrives in chaos, using his nimble fingers and quick wit to survive. "Stealing is an art," he smirks.
character.Equipment:
burglar's pack
candle
case, map or scroll
clothes, costume
hide armor
lamp
leatherworker's tools
pike

character.PersonalityTraits: Charming, agile, resourceful. The Male Gnome Rogue uses wit and stealth to outsmart his foes.
character.Backstory:
The OG Mad Gnome, known for his erratic and unpredictable behavior, was once a member of a notorious criminal organization that specialized in smuggling and extortion. His cunning and deceptive nature allowed him to quickly rise through the ranks, but his tendency for violence and chaos eventually led to his exile from the group. Now a rogue without allegiance, The OG Mad Gnome roams the streets, spreading fear and chaos wherever he goes, seeking to create his own criminal empire. 

With a wicked grin and a glint in his eye, The OG Mad Gnome strikes fear into the hearts of all who cross his path.
character.Ideals: The OG Mad Gnome: Exiled rogue seeking to build his own criminal empire. Watch out for his erratic and unpredictable behavior!
character.Bonds: Ex-criminal rogue seeks to build own empire with cunning and chaos. Watch your back.
character.Flaws: Deceptive and violent tendencies jeopardize alliances. Watch out for The OG Mad Gnome's unpredictable wrath.
character.Allies&Organizations: Former member of The Underworld Syndicate. Now a rogue on his own path to power and destruction.
character.Equipment:
burglar's pack
carpenter's tools
chalk (1 piece)
glaive
lantern, bullseye
pouch
robes
studded leather armor

character.PersonalityTraits: Stealthy, cunning, skilled in lock-picking. The Male Dwarf Rogue excels in navigating through shadows undetected.
character.Backstory:
The OG Mad Dwarf, known for his ruthless tactics and cunning nature, was born into a notorious criminal organization deep within the mountains. From a young age, he excelled in the art of deception and thievery, quickly rising through the ranks to become a feared leader. His ability to manipulate others and twist situations to his advantage only bolstered his reputation as a dangerous individual not to be crossed. Fluent in both Common and Dwarvish, The OG Mad Dwarf navigates the criminal underworld with ease, using his silver tongue to sow chaos and discord wherever he goes. With a penchant for violence and chaos, he leaves a trail of destruction in his wake, always one step ahead of those who seek to bring him down. But beware, for crossing paths with The OG Mad Dwarf is a gamble few survive to regret.

"You may think you know the depths of darkness, but I'll show you true madness," The OG Mad Dwarf chuckled ominously, his eyes gleaming with malice.
character.Ideals: Master manipulator, cunning rogue, feared leader in the criminal underworld. Beware his silver tongue and ruthless tactics.
character.Bonds: Bond: Hiding secrets that could destroy his criminal empire. Avoiding betrayal at all costs. Beware his wrath.
character.Flaws: Overconfidence in his abilities may lead to underestimating opponents.
character.Allies&Organizations: Member of the Black Hand Syndicate, a shadowy network of thieves and assassins. Join at your own risk.
